headlines.text: USS Gerald R. Ford returns home after record 326-day deployment supporting Iran war
Israel strikes Lebanon just hours after agreeing to 45-day ceasefire extension
Iran FM claims victory: 'All countries now acknowledge Iran was the victor in this war'
New Ebola outbreak in Congo kills 80, spreads to Uganda; no vaccine exists for this strain
Stock market tumbles: Dow falls 537 points, S&P 500 drops 1.24% as Iran war inflation fears mount
Gas prices hit $4.53/gal nationally — up more than a dollar since US-Israel attacked Iran in February
Trump-Xi summit ends with no major breakthroughs on Iran, Taiwan, or trade
House passes first fiscal 2027 appropriations bill as Republicans push budget reconciliation
Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael' closing in on $600M at global box office as Paris Jackson feuds with estate
Euphoria Season 3 finale confirmed as longest episode in HBO history at 93 minutes

breaking.text: Ebola outbreak in Congo spreads to Uganda — 246 suspected cases, 80+ dead, no vaccine for this strain

stories.hed: USS Ford Is Home, War Is Not: Aircraft Carrier Returns After Record Deployment as Iran Talks Stay Stuck
stories.dek: The world's largest aircraft carrier docked in Norfolk on Saturday after a record 326-day deployment covering the Iran war, the capture of Maduro, and enough frequent flyer miles to retire on. Back on shore, the war it left behind is still very much ongoing — Iran's FM is claiming victory while Israel is bombing Lebanon hours after a ceasefire extension, which is a very creative interpretation of the word 'ceasefire.'

stories.hed: New Ebola Outbreak Kills 80 in Congo, Spreads to Uganda — and There Is No Vaccine for This Strain
stories.dek: Africa CDC confirmed 246 suspected cases and at least 80 deaths of a rare Bundibugyo strain of Ebola in Congo's Ituri province, which happens to border Uganda and South Sudan, happen to be a mining hub with constant population movement, and happen to have no approved vaccine or treatment. Uganda has already confirmed one death. Public health experts call this potentially the second-largest non-Zaire Ebola outbreak in history.

stories.hed: Wall Street Wipes Out Records in One Day: Dow Loses 537 Points as Iran War Inflation Fears Grip Markets
stories.dek: One day after the Dow cracked 50,000 for the first time since February, markets remembered the Strait of Hormuz is still closed, oil is above $100, the new Fed chair Kevin Warsh just took Jerome Powell's keys, and the Trump-Xi summit produced zero breakthroughs. Nvidia dropped 4.4%, Intel cratered 6%, and energy was the only sector that went up — because of course it was.

stories.hed: Gas Hits $4.53 Nationally, California Above $6, Oklahoma the Last Refuge at $3.94
stories.dek: Average gas prices are up more than a dollar since the US-Israel war on Iran began February 28, with six states now above $5 a gallon and California eclipsing $6. Analysts warn the national average could hit $5 before summer. Oklahoma remains America's cheapest gas refuge, which is the most Oklahoma has mattered to coastal elites since the land rush.

stories.hed: Trump Leaves Beijing 'Empty-Handed' After Xi Summit: Big Trip, Small Receipts
stories.dek: Trump flew to China with 16 top CEOs, got a 200-Boeing-jet order (half of what Wall Street expected), took a stroll through Zhongnanhai admiring Chinese roses, and left with no deal on Iran, tariffs, or Taiwan. The market's 1%+ selloff on Friday was Wall Street's polite way of saying the vibe did not match the invoice.

markets.context: Stocks fell sharply Friday as Iran war inflation fears, rising Treasury yields hitting 4.55%, and a disappointing Trump-Xi summit with no breakthroughs sent investors fleeing tech and into energy.

gas.note: Filling up your tank now costs more than a reasonable dinner for two — the Iran war says you're welcome.

popCulture.hed: Euphoria Season 3 Finale Confirmed as Longest Episode in HBO History at 93 Minutes — Topping Game of Thrones
popCulture.dek: With only three episodes left before the May 31 finale, HBO confirmed the Euphoria Season 3 closer will run a record-shattering 93 minutes, surpassing Game of Thrones' 'The Long Night.' Zendaya has already hinted this is the series finale, so Sam Levinson apparently needs every single one of those 93 minutes to wrap up whatever is happening in adult Rue's life.

genZ.term: No You Don't Get to Ask Questions
genZ.definition: A TikTok trend built around playful defensiveness where creators show themselves doing something clearly questionable and shut down any attempt at explanation with the line 'no, you don't get to ask questions.' The humor comes from the tension of something being obviously wrong but completely unaddressed, which in May 2026 feels deeply relatable.
genZ.usage: Trump leaving the Beijing summit with 200 Boeing jets instead of the 500 Wall Street expected: 'No, you don't get to ask questions.'

tldr: The USS Gerald R. Ford came home from a record 326-day deployment today, but the Iran war it sailed into is still very much unresolved — Israel bombed Lebanon hours after a ceasefire extension, Iran's FM declared victory, and markets cratered on inflation fears. Meanwhile, a no-vaccine Ebola strain is spreading from Congo to Uganda, gas is $4.53 and climbing, and Euphoria's series finale is shaping up to be 93 minutes of Zendaya crying in HD.
